top3.sql:
SELECT 
    ROUND(
        (COUNT(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'single' AND m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 END) * 100.0) / 
        NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'single' THEN 1 END), 0), 
        5
    ) AS percentage
FROM bond b
JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id;

SELECT ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN bond_type = 'single' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 5) AS percentage
FROM bond;

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        (COUNT(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'single' AND m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 END) * 100.0) / 
        NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'single' THEN 1 END), 0), 
        5
    ) AS percentage
FROM bond b
JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id;

SELECT ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN bond_type = 'single' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 5) AS percentage
FROM bond;

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        (COUNT(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'single' AND m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 END) * 100.0) / 
        NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'single' THEN 1 END), 0), 
        5
    ) AS percentage
FROM bond b
JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id;

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        (SELECT COUNT(*) 
         FROM bond b 
         JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id 
         WHERE b.bond_type = 'single' AND m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%') * 100.0 / 
        NULLIF(
            (SELECT COUNT(*) 
             FROM bond 
             WHERE bond_type = 'single'), 
            0
        ), 
        5
    ) AS percentage;

SELECT ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN bond_type = 'single' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 5) AS percentage
FROM bond;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    ROUND(
        (COUNT(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'single' AND m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 END) * 100.0) / 
        NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'single' THEN 1 END), 0), 
        5
    ) AS percentage
FROM bond b
JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id;
